title: Create Superheated
description: Adds brand new materials used in a magical way that enhances the Minecraft experience with effects, amour, new structures and more still coming.
body:
# Create Superheated 
A Create mod expansion that adds upon the base game adding new weapons, abilities tools, Dungeons and equipment for you to explore fight and more.

## PVP
The mod includes various items that can turn the tide of a battle, looking like a losing one at first but at the end not.

## Dungeons
Dunegons contains new items flowers and mobs for you to battle and conquer and at the end open your dungeon reward chest.
  
--------------
### All Coming June 2024
